label: Expert Amp Server v1
info: Dashboard-fidelity Expert Amp Server flow. Preserves WB2WGH CSS, button styles, groups (SPE/SPE Auxiliary), gauges, and level indicators. Live status is websocket-first via /api/v1/status/ws with HTTP fallback polling. Display render stays on its own refresh path. Required: node-red-dashboard, node-red-contrib-ui-level.

name: SPE Master CSS
format:
<style>
  .SPEhoverblue:hover {
    color: blue;
    border-radius: 10px;
    border: 5px solid blue;
  }
  .SPEhoverred:hover {
    color: red;
    border-radius: 10px;
    border: 5px solid red;
  }
  .SPEfilled {
    height: 100% !important;
    padding: 0 !important;
    margin: 0 !important;
  }
  .SPEnr-dashboard-template {
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
  }
  .SPErounded {
    border-radius: 12px 12px 12px 12px;
  }
  .SPEbigfont {
    font-size: 18px;
  }
  .SPEmedfont {
    font-size: 16px;
  }
  .SPEsmallfont {
    font-size: 12px;
  }
</style>

<script>
$('.SPEvibrate').on('click', function() {
  navigator.vibrate(100);
});

function restore_bg(x) {
  $(this).css("background-color", x);
}

$('.SPEtouched').on('mousedown', function() {
  var x = $(this).css("background-color");
  $(this).css("background-color", "yellow");
  setTimeout(restore_bg.bind(this, x), 100);
  navigator.vibrate(80);
});
</script>

name: Expert Amp Server Node-RED example - WB2WGH dashboard fidelity pass
info:
Dashboard-fidelity port of the WB2WGH SPE Linear flow (V1.3) to Expert Amp Server /api/v1.

Preserved from original:
- SPE Master CSS (SPEvibrate, SPEfilled, SPEtouched, SPErounded, SPEhoverblue, SPEhoverred)
- Group layout: SPE (width=6) + SPE Auxiliary (width=4) on one tab
- All 25 original SPE tile names and order
- All 14 SPE Auxiliary button names and order
- ui_gauge x5 (order positions 8, 9, 12, 13, 16)
- ui_level x3 for ATU SWR / ANT SWR / Output Power (order 2, 4, 6)
- Color-state logic: RX/TX, Mode, PWR Level, Warnings, Alarms
- Tune static-green button, Power On/Off orange buttons

Changed from original:
- Serial nodes removed; live status is websocket-first via /api/v1/status/ws with HTTP fallback polling (5s) + GET /api/v1/alarms (10s)
- Display render invalidation is websocket-first via /api/v1/display/ws, with render.png refreshed only on real snapshot changes
- Button actions POST to /api/v1/actions/button
- Logging State shows 'HTTP API' (file/CSV logging removed)
- USB Status reflects websocket-first/API connectivity, not physical USB
- USB Sync triggers immediate HTTP status refresh
- Gauges remapped to promoted API fields for PA volts, PA amps, ANT SWR, plus Power W / SWR / temperatures where available
- Backlight On/Off mapped to 'display' (closest available action)
- Fan Quiet / Fan Normal shown as disabled (not in current action table)
- Bank tile is read-only (bank select not in current API)
- Display render image added at top on its own refresh path (Expert Amp Server feature)
- back / on / standby remain blocked per server policy

Required packages: node-red-dashboard, node-red-contrib-ui-level
Server default: http://localhost:8088 -- edit 'Set expertAmpBaseUrl' to change.
